case_title: JENNIFER CLAMME ET AL VS. CELESTE CONCANNON

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLAMME, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT CONCANNON, CELESTE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT CONCANNON, CELESTE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-05-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER CLAMME IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF JOHN CLAMME IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CELESTE CONCANNON IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. FILING WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF PROVIDED DOCUMENTATION SHOWING SHERIFF'S OFFICE FAILED TO FILE SERVICE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR THE BALANCE OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT PAYMENT OF $1273.22 (INCLUDES COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JUL-5TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE AND/OR CHECKS #4801 AND #4804 ARE NOT SUCCESSFULLY DEPOSITED. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. SEE ATTACHMENT ON ORDER FOR STATEMENT OF DECISION. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD. SC-100 MAILED CERTIFIED TO CELESTE CONCANNON-UNCLAIMED/RETURN TO SENDER
REMARK: DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RECD VIA MAIL
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CLAMME, JENNIFER CLAMME, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT CONCANNON, CELESTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT CONCANNON, CELESTE
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED** (DEFENDANT)
